summary.VAL-001: Algorithm correctness validation passed through deterministic unit and integration tests for workload, subject competency, class familiarity, recency, preference policy, composite ranking, edge cases, and explainability.
summary.VAL-007: Recommendation performance/status smoke passed through 100-candidate scorer benchmark, synchronous recommendation route tests, async job polling, idempotent retry, and pglocal PostgreSQL API execution. Browser-level fallback remains tracked by WAVE-006/VAL-015.
summary.VAL-016: Teacher availability validation passed: self-service scope is enforced, unavailable teachers are filtered from recommendations, and restored availability makes an otherwise eligible teacher recommendable again.

test_summary.api_without_database_url: 84 tests total, 78 passed, 6 skipped because DATABASE_URL is not set
test_summary.api_pglocal: 84 tests passed, 0 skipped against existing Docker Postgres 18 pglocal
test_summary.typecheck: passed for api, web, and contracts workspaces
test_summary.build: passed for api, web, and contracts workspaces

bug_fixed_during_validation: Synchronous recommendation requests now recompute after availability changes instead of returning a stale completed job; async idempotent retry still returns the cached completed job for identical async retry behavior.
residual_risk: Full browser recommendation status/fallback and substitute offer UI are still WAVE-006 work, tracked by TASK-027, TASK-030, and VAL-015.
